name: JPMorgan Chase
ai_strategy_summary: JPMorgan runs an 'AI Factory' strategy — building network effects across 200,000+ employees and 450+ production use cases to compound operational advantage. In wealth management, Coach AI compresses advisor prep time so each advisor can serve 50% more clients, directly driving a 20% year-over-year sales increase. The $19.8 billion 2026 technology budget positions AI as the central competitive battleground.
headline_metric: $5.9T client assets, +18% YoY — driven in part by Coach AI enabling a 20% gross sales increase
headline_initiative: Coach AI ecosystem (Connect Coach for Private Bank) — real-time research, recommendations, and client prep via NLP, deployed to all wealth management and private banking advisors

advisor_productivity.headline: Coach AI / Connect Coach: 95% faster info retrieval, 20% YoY gross sales growth across all WM + PB advisors
advisor_productivity.detail: JPMorgan's Coach AI (Wealth Management) and Connect Coach (Private Bank) deploy NLP to surface real-time client intelligence, next-best-action recommendations, and research digests before every client interaction. Deployed to all 5,755 WM advisors and 3,775 PB advisors. The result: 95% reduction in time to retrieve client information and a 20% year-over-year increase in gross sales — with a stated goal of enabling each advisor to serve 50% more clients over 3–5 years.
evidence: 95% faster client information retrieval (Coach AI internal benchmark)
20% YoY gross sales growth attributed to Coach AI deployment
Deployed to all Wealth Management and Private Bank advisors
50% more clients per advisor capacity target (3–5 year horizon)
Connect Coach: same architecture extended to Private Bank advisors

client_personalization.headline: Connect Coach delivers real-time personalized recommendations; IndexGPT generates thematic investment ideas live
client_personalization.detail: Connect Coach surfaces personalized investment recommendations and portfolio insights in real time during advisor-client interactions. IndexGPT — JPMorgan's proprietary thematic ETF generation tool — uses NLP to construct thematic investment baskets from market signals, giving advisors a differentiated product to offer clients. Both tools are in production across the advisor network.
evidence: Connect Coach: real-time personalized recommendations to all PB advisors
IndexGPT: live thematic ETF/index construction using NLP (trademark filed)
Personalization layer integrated into coach workflow, not a separate app

investment_portfolio.headline: AI-powered model portfolios with public/private market access; IndexGPT for thematic ETF construction
investment_portfolio.detail: JPMorgan's wealth management platform offers AI-informed model portfolios spanning public and private markets. IndexGPT enables construction of thematic investment indices using large language models, a first-of-its-kind capability at scale. These tools are deployed to advisors but not yet fully autonomous — human oversight remains in the investment decision loop.
evidence: Model portfolios span public + alternative/private market asset classes
IndexGPT trademark filed; thematic index generation in production
AI-assisted but human-approved portfolio construction process

research_content.headline: LLM Suite (GPT-4 foundation) deployed to 200,000+ employees; 40% of research tasks automatable
research_content.detail: JPMorgan deployed LLM Suite — built on GPT-4 — to over 200,000 employees firm-wide, making it one of the largest enterprise LLM deployments in financial services. Internal analysis estimates 40% of research and content tasks can be automated using AI. In wealth management, advisors use LLM Suite for research summarization, market commentary, and client report generation.
evidence: LLM Suite deployed to 200,000+ JPMorgan employees
Built on GPT-4 with internal customization
40% of research tasks identified as automatable (internal study)
Research summarization live for wealth advisors

client_acquisition.headline: Advisor capacity expansion (50% more clients per advisor) is primary acquisition lever — no direct digital-only acquisition play yet
client_acquisition.detail: JPMorgan's client acquisition strategy in wealth management is advisor-led: by making each advisor more productive with AI, the firm grows AUM without proportionally growing headcount. A separate direct-to-consumer digital wealth play exists (Self-Directed Investing) but AI-native acquisition tools are not yet in production.
evidence: 50% more clients per advisor capacity target cited by management (3–5 year horizon)
Self-Directed Investing platform exists but without AI-native acquisition tools in production
No announced AI-powered prospecting or lead scoring product for advisors

operations_compliance.headline: COiN platform: 360,000 work hours saved/year; 95% AML false positive reduction
operations_compliance.detail: JPMorgan's Contract Intelligence (COiN) platform was one of the first large-scale enterprise AI deployments in banking. It automates commercial loan agreement review, saving 360,000 hours of manual work per year. In compliance, AI-powered AML transaction monitoring has reduced false positives by 95%, materially lowering the cost of regulatory compliance. These systems are mature and in production at scale.
evidence: COiN: 360,000 work hours saved annually on loan document review
AML AI: 95% reduction in false positive rate
Both systems in production at scale; not pilots
Operations AI is a cost-centre-to-profit-centre transformation story at JPM

new_business_models.headline: IndexGPT as AI-native thematic product; considering client-facing version of Connect Coach
new_business_models.detail: IndexGPT represents JPMorgan's clearest attempt to create a net-new AI-native product — not just AI applied to existing workflows. The firm is reportedly evaluating a client-facing version of the Connect Coach ecosystem that would allow high-net-worth clients to interact directly with AI-generated recommendations. These are early-stage explorations, not yet in production.
evidence: IndexGPT: USPTO trademark filed; product live for advisor use
Client-facing AI wealth interface under evaluation (not yet announced)
AI Factory strategy explicitly targets new revenue lines, not just cost savings
